title: changelog entries for v1.6.3 are missing and no 1.6 RA on podman.io
body:
Just pulled up the changelog.txt file and it has no entries for 1.6.3.

Also there's not a release announcement for 1.6* on podman.io, poke, poke.

comments.body: This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
@mheon is this something you fix quickly?
I would just close this.  I don't see a big issue in going back and fixing this. Not a high priority. We are onto 1.7.0 at this point.
